name: Bayer CropScience Limited
summary: Bayer CropScience Limited is an Indian subsidiary of Bayer AG focused on agricultural solutions, including seeds, crop protection products, and non-agricultural pest control. The company offers a range of products for crop protection, pest management, and seed technology, and is headquartered in Mumbai, India. Bayer CropScience aims to improve agriculture by providing innovative products and sustainable solutions for farmers.
